creator: deischen@iworks.InterWorks.org
text:
Update Nedit port to correct checksum.  Also modified the app resource
        file so that it doesn't overwrite an existing app resource file (Nedit
        loads backup resources so it doesn't need a resource file).  Changed
        the PLIST to reference the correct man files and app resource file.

Fix: Patch to port included below.
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
